title.en: China-to-Iraq Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器进入伊拉克：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器進入伊拉克：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China solar PV inverter documentation against Iraq COSQC conformity requirements, Ministry of Electricity (MoE) grid-connection and project specifications, IEC 62109-1/-2 safety evidence, IEC 62116 anti-islanding, IEC 61000/62920 EMC, 50 Hz 230/400 V grid settings, and Iraq's grid-instability context for hybrid/off-grid designs — versus China GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964-2024 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国太阳能光伏逆变器文件与伊拉克COSQC合格评定要求、电力部（MoE）并网及项目规格、IEC 62109-1/-2安全证据、IEC 62116防孤岛、IEC 61000/62920 EMC、50 Hz 230/400 V电网参数及伊拉克电网不稳定性对混合/离网设计影响——对比中国GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024基准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國太陽能光伏逆變器文件與伊拉克COSQC合格評定要求、電力部（MoE）併網及項目規格、IEC 62109-1/-2安全證據、IEC 62116防孤島、IEC 61000/62920 EMC、50 Hz 230/400 V電網參數及伊拉克電網不穩定性對混合/離網設計影響——對比中國GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024基準的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, COSQC conformity scope determination, Ministry of Electricity grid-connection approval, project-owner equipment eligibility decision, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Iraq COSQC Technical Regulations, Ministry of Electricity grid-connection technical specifications, IQS standards adoption, pre-shipment inspection requirements, and project-owner requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、COSQC合格评定范围裁定、电力部并网批准、项目业主设备资格决定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行伊拉克COSQC技术法规、电力部并网技术规格、IQS标准采纳状况、装运前检查要求及项目业主要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、COSQC合格評定範圍裁定、電力部併網批准、項目業主設備資格決定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行伊拉克COSQC技術法規、電力部併網技術規格、IQS標準採納狀況、裝運前檢查要求及項目業主要求。

answer_first.en: For solar PV inverters exported from China to Iraq, the key practical gaps are: (1) COSQC pre-shipment inspection and IQS conformity — Iraq's import regime requires conformity assessment against applicable Iraqi Standards (IQS) or accepted IEC equivalents before clearance; (2) IEC 62109-1/-2 safety type-test evidence, which large-scale MoE and project-tendered installations (TotalEnergies, PowerChina, Masdar) reference in their IEC-aligned procurement specifications; (3) IEC 62116 anti-islanding compliance validated for Iraq's 50 Hz / 230 V / 400 V grid parameters; (4) IEC 61000/62920 EMC evidence; and (5) hybrid and off-grid inverter suitability — Iraq's chronic grid instability means many installations integrate diesel/generator backup, requiring inverter specifications to cover hybrid operating modes. China GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964-2024 baselines are not automatically accepted under COSQC conformity requirements and must be mapped to IQS/IEC gates.
answer_first.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器出口伊拉克时，主要实际差距包括：（1）COSQC装运前检查和IQS合格评定——伊拉克进口制度要求在通关前依据适用伊拉克标准（IQS）或认可的IEC等效标准进行合格评定；（2）IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式试验证据，大型MoE及项目招标装置（道达尔能源、中国电力、马斯达尔）在其IEC对齐的采购规格中有所引用；（3）针对伊拉克50 Hz / 230 V / 400 V电网参数验证的IEC 62116防孤岛合规；（4）IEC 61000/62920 EMC证据；（5）混合及离网逆变器适用性——伊拉克长期电网不稳定导致许多装置集成柴油/发电机备用，要求逆变器规格涵盖混合运行模式。中国GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024基准不被COSQC合格要求自动接受，必须映射至IQS/IEC准入门槛。
answer_first.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器出口伊拉克時，主要實際差距包括：（1）COSQC裝運前檢查和IQS合格評定——伊拉克進口制度要求在通關前依據適用伊拉克標準（IQS）或認可的IEC等效標準進行合格評定；（2）IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式試驗證據，大型MoE及項目招標裝置（道達爾能源、中國電力、馬斯達爾）在其IEC對齊的採購規格中有所引用；（3）針對伊拉克50 Hz / 230 V / 400 V電網參數驗證的IEC 62116防孤島合規；（4）IEC 61000/62920 EMC證據；（5）混合及離網逆變器適用性——伊拉克長期電網不穩定導致許多裝置集成柴油/發電機備用，要求逆變器規格涵蓋混合運行模式。中國GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024基準不被COSQC合格要求自動接受，必須映射至IQS/IEC准入門檻。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
